fields.Name: BLA Assembled Prompt
fields.Description: Seed prompt for the BLA (Betty Layered Assembler) Flow Agent. The single-placeholder template ({{BettyPrompt}}) is intentionally minimal — the BLA Execute Prompt action uses templateMessageRole='none' so the rendered template never enters the conversation, instead supplying a structured ChatMessage[] via conversationMessages assembled from betty.PromptComponent rows. The rendered template still appears on the AIPromptRun record as an audit-text snapshot of the System-role components that were selected.
